candidate_llm_application: LLM RLHF reward shaping via politeness redress: train rewards along positive-face and negative-face axes separately, allowing fine-grained alignment to user preferences in face-threatening situations.

results.title: Multi-Dimensional Rlhf Preference Modeling: Survey
results.snippet: This 2025-2026 paper presents work on multi-dimensional RLHF preference modeling, covering LLM-side mechanisms that achieve similar functional outcomes via alternative terminology.
